# MeetJapan

MeetJapan is a calm, practical guide for foreign travelers visiting Japan.

## Core article URLs
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/mobile-suica
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/tax-free-shopping
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/atm-guide
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/luggage-forwarding
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/tattoo-onsen
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/express-train
- https://site-xi-six-26.vercel.app/articles/donki-guide

## Topic summary
- transport
- money
- shopping
- onsen
- arrival comfort

## Editorial style
- short answers first
- practical for first-time travelers
- low-stress reading on mobile
